source: Thaumcraft 4 player-scoped scan knowledge semantics adapted to Forge 1.19.2 persistent player NBT
rules: Thaumometer scans are owned by the player, not by the individual thaumometer item.
The old per-item NBT lists are retained only as a compatibility mirror.
Scanned aspect ids are stored under player thaum data; aspect pool/discovery is synchronized through PlayerAspectKnowledge.
Research scan triggers remain sourced from Stage150/151 original metadata.
